Download to watch & record live TV from 100+ networks, including local sports & news, as part of your monthly membership. Cancel anytime. +Cable-free live TV. No cable box required. +Stream major broadcast and cable networks, including CBS, FOX, NBC, NFL Network, HGTV, TNT, AMC, and more, including your local sports & news channels. +Watch on your smartphone, tablet, computer, and TV +Cloud DVR without DVR storage space limits. Each recording will be stored for 9 months. +6 YouTube TV accounts per household. Everyone gets their own login, recommendations and DVR. +Monthly pay-as-you-go membership; cancel anytime. Over 100 networks are available in YouTube TV: BROADCAST CBS, FOX, NBC, NFL Network, PBS, and more SPORTS CBS Sports Network, NBC Sports RSN (regional), NFL Network, Golf Channel, SEC Network, and more ENTERTAINMENT & LIFESTYLE AMC, Animal Planet, BBC America, BET, Bravo, Cheddar, CMT, Comedy Central, Comet, Cozi TV, Decades, Discovery, E!, Food Network, IFC, Investigation Discovery, HGTV, MotorTrend, MTV, Oxygen, Paramount Network, Pop, Smithsonian Channel, SundanceTV, SyFy, TBS, TCM, TLC, TNT, Travel Channel, TruTV, TV Land, USA, VH1, WE tv, YouTube Originals, and more NEWS BBC World News, Cheddar Big News, CNBC, CNN, HLN, MSNBC, and more KIDS Cartoon Network, Nickelodeon, PBS Kids, Universal Kids Availability: YouTube TV is available nationwide in the United States. For more information, please visit our Help Center. Your membership will automatically continue for as long as you choose to remain a member. Your membership is a month-to-month subscription that begins at sign up. You can easily cancel anytime, online, 24 hours a day. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees. Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period. Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings on the device. Locally broadcast Fox and CBS games, Sunday Night Football on NBC, select digital-only games and international games excluded from NFL Sunday Ticket.

Nice to meet you, we’re Tubi. We’re more than a completely free streamer with the largest library in the entire streaming universe. We’re entertainment fiends and collectors, and never judgers. So, get comfy and settle into whatever you’re feeling. It’s about to get good. WATCH FREE: Live TV: news, weather, sports, & entertainment It’s live, always on, always free and has way fewer ads than cable. We call that a win-win-win-win. + Check your local news channels for weather and news. + Get game day ready with pre-game excitement. + Unwind with your favorite TV competitions and guilty pleasures. Movies From the biggest names in the industry to the indie darlings we can’t get enough of. + Top titles added every month. + Bask in loads of drama that isn’t your own. + Comedy, action, and horror…oh, my! Whatever genre you’re looking for, we have it. Series Marathon all the best series, all in one place, with zero subscriptions ever. + Refine your taste buds with cooking shows and competitions. + Get lost in the drama of an evening soap. + Decompress with laugh-out-loud sitcoms. Tubi Originals Made by us, just for you. And only available on Tubi. + Critically acclaimed series like Boarders and Big Mood. + Live out your fantasies with all-new reality shows, series, and movies. Tubi Comic Con(tent) It's a bird, it's a plane, it's...all your favorite comic book heroes and caped crusaders! + Binge full series, old school and new. + Stay current with the latest Hollywood releases. Tubi Español Tú perteneces aquí. Watch in Spanish with no subtitles necessary. + Keep up with all your telenovelas. + Stream Spanish-first favorites and discover dubbed blockbusters. International Entertainment + Ikuze! We have all the anime! + Korea’s in the house!! Get your fill of K-pop, horror, action, comedy, and drama. + Live the Bollywood dream and dance along with tons of favorites. MORE PERKS + Swipe your way to discovering new content. + Never run out of stuff to watch. We add new arrivals every week. + Here, there, everywhere. Tubi works on 30+ devices, so it goes wherever you go. + We’ll never ask for your credit card, ever. It’s free forever. For really. + Create an account to build your own watchlist, save your watch progress, and get better recommendations. See You In There™

Google TV, previously Play Movies & TV, makes it easy to find and enjoy the entertainment you love in one place. With Google TV, you'll be able to: Find what to watch next Browse 700,000+ movies and TV episodes from across your streaming apps, all in one place and organized into topics and genres. Discover new things with recommendations based on what you love and what’s trending across the services you already have access to. Search for titles to see which streaming apps offer them. See the latest releases Buy or rent the newest movies and shows right in the Shop tab. Purchases are stored in your Library and can be downloaded to watch when you're not connected. Watch instantly on your laptop, Android phone or tablet, or on your TV with Google TV or on Play Movies & TV where available. One list for all your discoveries Add interesting shows and movies to your Watchlist to keep track of your new discoveries and view them later. The Watchlist is shared between all your devices, so you can even add to your Watchlist from your TV or phone and laptop through Search on any browser. Use your phone as your remote With a remote built right into the app, you can find something great to watch even when the couch has eaten your remote. And you can use your phone’s keyboard to quickly type complicated passwords, movie names or search terms on your Google TV or other Android TV OS device. Pantaya is a service only available in the US. Separate subscriptions required for certain streaming services or access to certain content.

Instant notifications for new releases, episodes, and live events. Netflix membership is a month-to-month subscription that begins at sign-up. You can easily cancel anytime, online, 24 hours a day. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees. We just want you to love what you watch. Please note that the App Privacy information applies to information collected through the Netflix iOS, iPadOS, and tvOS apps. See the Netflix Privacy Statement (link below) to learn more about information we collect in other contexts, including account registration. Inspire your kids to uncover their unique interests Help your kids explore video content they love and parents trust, in an app made just for kids. With easy navigation tools and a suite of features, you can help your kids spend time online uncovering new interests, unleashing their imagination, and building their confidence in their own unique world. Help your kids grow at their own pace Your kids are unique, so they should only see content they're ready to explore. Decide what videos will help them make the most of their time online, then personalize individual profiles using custom content filters as they grow. - Help your youngest kids learn their ABCs, nurture their curiosity, and more in the Preschool mode. - Expand your kids interests to songs, cartoons, or DIY crafts in Younger mode. - Give your older kids the freedom to search popular music and gaming videos in Older mode. - Or hand-pick the videos, channels, and collections your kids can see in Approved Content Only mode. Rewatch videos and bond over favorites Quickly find your kids’ favorite videos and the content you’ve shared with them in the Watch it Again tab. Shape your kids’ viewing experience with Parental Controls Parental Control features help you limit what your kids watch and better guide their viewing experience. Our blocking process aims to help keep videos on YouTube Kids family-friendly and safe – but each family's preferences are unique. Don't like a video or channel, or see inappropriate content? Flag it for our team to review. Set a screen-time limit Encourage your kids to take a break in between exploring content. Use the Timer feature to freeze the app when screen time is up so your kids can apply their new skills to the real world. See important information - Parental setup is needed to ensure the best experience for your family. - Kids may see commercial content from YouTube creators that are not paid ads. - See The Privacy Notice for Google Accounts managed with Family Link for information on our privacy practices for signing in with a Google Account. - If your kids use the app without signing in with their Google Account, the YouTube Kids Privacy Notice applies.

Stories, global music, performing arts, creative writing, and street food from all over the world. At BookMyShow, we take our users' privacy seriously. • Storage: We save some data locally to avoid making a lot of network calls. • Your Location: We use the location data to show you venues around you. No data is saved on our servers. • Your Social Information: We only need to read your contacts when you need to pick someone from the contacts to share the booking details. We don't save any of this data on our servers, ever. • Your application’s information & Logs: We use this to gather the information that helps us fix issues that you may experience with our app. We do not save any of this information. • Your Accounts: We require this to be able to send Push Notifications. Don’t worry, we never spam. • Your Contacts: We need access to your contacts so that you can invite your friends to chat or join you after you've booked your tickets. We ask for your contact permission for a bunch of features like chat, sharing tickets with friends. Your information will be kept confidential. • Read and Receive SMS: We need this permission to enable our app to read your One-Time-Password SMS and automatically enter the code while completing the payment. Your privacy will be respected, and no information will be saved. Download our app for FREE and book tickets on the go. Entertainment is at your fingertips. For more entertainment, follow us on social media! Need help? Head to the Help Centre page on our mobile application, and we are sure you’d find answers to any queries that may cross your mind.

column13: [What is ABEMA, the original TV drama & video streaming service?] "ABEMA" is a video streaming service that aims to innovate television and is developing as "the new future of television." No registration is required, and it broadcasts approximately 30 channels across a wide range of genres 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, including a 24-hour news channel, original dramas, reality dating shows, anime, sports, and more. Furthermore, it boasts the No. 1 number of original episodes among domestic video services (*1), and offers a rich lineup of works including popular anime and dramas from Japan and abroad, as well as online live performances of various music and stage shows. You can enjoy works anytime without being bound by time, whether on TV or on-demand, and you can watch programs according to your lifestyle without being bound by location, on smartphones, PCs, tablets, and TV devices. (*1) As of April 2025, based on our own research. In addition, by subscribing to "ABEMA Premium" for 1180 yen (tax included) per month, you can enjoy "ABEMA" even more, such as being able to watch exclusive content and using exclusive functions such as "catch-up playback" and "download function." Additionally, the "ABEMA Premium Ad-Included Plan" for ¥680 per month (tax included) allows you to watch ABEMA Premium exclusive content with ads. [ABEMA is a TV/movie/anime/drama streaming service recommended for people who:] ・Don't have time to watch TV, anime, or movies at home ・Want to watch TV, anime, or movies in their spare time ・Want to watch popular anime in advance ・Want to watch TV, anime, or dramas of various genres ・Don't have a TV at home and want to watch TV, anime, or dramas via a video streaming app ・Want to watch TV, anime, or variety shows that aren't available on terrestrial television ・Want to binge-watch popular past anime and TV shows ・Want to watch many anime titles for free ・Often watch anime, dramas, and TV shows on apps ・Want to watch anime, domestic dramas, or Korean dramas at home now that they have more time at home ・Want to watch popular TV shows, dramas, and movies, as well as trending anime and movies ・Want to watch nostalgic TV shows, dramas, or anime streaming ・Want to watch TV or anime during their commute/school time I want to watch movies and other shows. - I'm looking for a streaming app that lets me watch anime, dramas, movies, etc. on my smartphone or tablet. - I want to create a list of anime I'm interested in and watch them on my days off. - I can't watch TV normally, so I want to watch anime and TV programs on an app with a good selection of catch-up streaming. - I want to watch anime and variety shows that aren't broadcast on TV. - I want to find popular anime titles from rankings. - I want to enjoy past anime series that I couldn't watch on TV at the time. - I want to enjoy TV, anime, and movies at my favorite time and place. - I just want to watch TV, anime, and movies endlessly. - I missed a TV show, anime, or movie. - I want to watch TV in real time, not just catch-up streaming of TV shows and anime. [Connect to your TV and watch popular anime/dramas/movies on a big screen] - You can enjoy ABEMA on your TV and various other devices. - For details, please see the compatible devices page below. - https://help.abema.tv/hc/ja/articles/360013743211 [Super easy, no registration required!] 】 Anyone can watch their favorite channels immediately without registering as a member. 【Two plans to choose from for unlimited viewing of ABEMA Premium content】 "ABEMA Premium": ¥1,180/month (tax included) "ABEMA Premium with ads": ¥680/month (tax included) Unlimited viewing of ABEMA Premium exclusive content such as anime and original dramas. 【Many ABEMA original programs】 ABEMA produces and broadcasts TV programs that can only be seen on ABEMA, such as original dramas and dating reality shows. In addition, the ABEMA NEWS channel broadcasts a 24-hour news channel, including breaking news, and original news programs. 【How to use ABEMA】 ■My List By adding works and programs you want to watch from the "My List" button, you can create your own viewing list. You can check the added works and programs on the "My List" page or from the "My List" list on the home screen. You can also receive notifications about newly released episodes and the start of broadcasts for added programs. ■ Posting and Viewing Comments Tap the icon in the lower right corner of the viewing screen to post and view comments. Comments can also be posted in conjunction with X (formerly Twitter). ■ Sharing Function You can easily share content on various social media platforms from the program page. Tell your friends about your favorite programs! 【ABEMA Official Guide】 For more detailed instructions and questions, please check the page below. https://help.abema.tv 【Contact Us】 For bug reports and other inquiries, please contact us at the address below. info@support.abema.tv Privacy Policy: https://abema.tv/about/privacy-policy Terms of Service: https://abema.tv/about/terms

A movie lover’s dream, the Criterion Channel offers classics and discoveries from around the world, thematically programmed with special features, on a streaming service brought to you by the Criterion Collection. With constantly refreshed selections of Hollywood, international, art-house, and independent movies, plus access to Criterion’s entire streaming library of more than 1,000 important classic and contemporary films, there’s something new to choose from every day of the week on the Criterion Channel. Start with Sunday Spotlights on directors, stars, genres, and themes; Tuesday’s Short + Feature; or the Friday double bill. Try out our 15-minute-a-month film school, Observations on Film Art, or choose from suggestions by friends like Barry Jenkins, Guillermo del Toro, or Mira Nair. Go deep with the Criterion Collection’s archive of special features for context that no other service can match. FEATURES - The Criterion Collection’s streaming library, including many complete editions released on Blu-ray and DVD, as well as unreleased titles - Ongoing programs of Hollywood, international, art-house, independent, documentary, and short films, including thematic programming, director and star retrospectives, and guest-curated series - Original Criterion Channel series such as Observations on Film Art, Adventures in Moviegoing, and Art-House America - Supplemental features to deepen your appreciation of the art of film, including audio commentaries, behind-the-scenes footage, scholarly analyses, introductions, new and archival interviews, and trailers To access all features and content you can subscribe to The Criterion Channel on a monthly or yearly basis with an auto-renewing subscription right inside the app.* Pricing can vary by region and will be confirmed before purchase in the app. In app subscriptions will automatically renew at the end of their cycle. * All payments will be paid through your Google Account and may be managed under Account Settings after the initial payment. From the LIVE section, you'll have access to live streaming of all Rai channels (Rai 1, Rai 2, Rai 3, Rai 4, Rai 5, Rai Movie, Rai Premium, Rai Gulp, Rai Yoyo, Rai Storia, Rai News24, Rai Sport, Rai Scuola, and Rai Radio2), exclusive live streaming content on RaiPlay channels, and the TV Guide/Replay service, allowing you to rewatch programs broadcast in the last 7 days on demand and discover upcoming Rai programming. From the MORE section, you can log in/register, pair a TV device, and access the advanced customization features available to registered users, such as the Continue Watching service or My Lists (Saved, Downloaded, Rated, and Last Viewed in the app for offline viewing). Live streaming of the channels is available without registration; creating a free Rai account and logging in to the platform is required to access full on-demand content and use the customization services available to registered users. Registration for RaiPlay – available on the mobile app and the web – is free and secure, and Rai will protect your data without sharing it with anyone. RaiPlay is also available as an Android TV app. After installing the RaiPlay app on your smart TV, you have three options to log in: pair the TV device by scanning the QR code on the TV screen with the smartphone or tablet on which you already use the RaiPlay app, or pair it by entering the numeric code displayed on the screen in the "Pair TV" section of RaiPlay (accessible on the mobile app from the More > Settings > Smart TV section and on RaiPlay browsing from the Support > Pair TV menu). You can also opt for the standard login process and enter your Rai account credentials (email and password) on the TV. This feature is available in multi-user mode, for use with family and friends. Please note that from abroad, you will only be able to access a portion of the content available on RaiPlay: live broadcasts of the Rai News24 channel and the on-demand catalog of works for which Rai holds the corresponding IP distribution rights. "발견의 기쁨, 왓챠" 장르도 형식도 자유롭게, 취향대로 즐겨보세요. 오리지널 · 영화 · 시리즈 · 애니 · 다큐까지, 왓챠에서만 만날 수 있는 작품이 기다리고 있어요. - 오? 이게 있다고? 어디서도 만나기 어려운 작품들, 왓챠에는 있습니다. - 나보다 나를 더 잘 아는 개인화 추천 나의 평가 · 감상 기록 기반 왓고리즘으로 취향에 맞는 작품을 추천해요. - 혼자 보기 아쉬울 땐, 왓챠파티 친구들과 채팅하며 동시에 볼 수 있는 왓챠파티로 즐거움을 나눠보세요. - 신작 및 인기 콘텐츠를 소장하세요 평생 곁에 두고 싶은 작품은 개별 구매로 소장하세요. - 영상 너머의 발견, 왓챠웹툰 영상뿐 아니라 웹툰까지 함께 즐겨요. [안내 사항] - 저작권 문제로 해외에서 이용할 수 없어요. - 기기 등록은 최대 5대까지 가능하며, 동시 재생은 구독권 종류에 따라 최소 1개, 최대 4개까지 지원돼요. - 일부 콘텐츠는 저작권자의 요청에 의해 동시 재생이 제한될 수 있어요. - 일부 콘텐츠는 저작권자의 요청에 의해 서비스 중 제공이 중단될 수 있어요. - 일부 콘텐츠는 콘텐츠 제공사의 사정에 의해 HD, FHD 및 Ultra HD 4K 화질이 제공되지 않을 수 있어요. - 구독권 종류, 네트워크 환경, 콘텐츠 계약 조건, 기기 사양에 따라 최대 화질이 제한될 수 있어요. [선택적 접근 권한 안내 사항] 선택적 접근 권한을 허용하지 않아도 해당 기능을 제외한 나머지 WATCHA 서비스는 계속 이용할 수 있어요. 일부 기능은 이용하시는 기기나 앱의 버전에 따라 지원되지 않을 수 있어요. - 알림 권한은 중요 공지, 신작, 콘텐츠 다운로드 상태 등을 받기 위해 필요해요. - 카메라 권한은 프로필 사진을 직접 촬영하여 변경할 때 필요해요. - 사진 접근 권한은 프로필 사진을 저장된 이미지로 변경할 때 필요해요. - 마이크 권한은 Android TV 기기에서 음성을 통해 콘텐츠를 검색할 때 필요해요. - 로컬 네트워크와 블루투스 권한은 크롬 캐스트 등의 기기 연동을 위해 필요해요. - 사용자 활동 추적 권한은 맞춤형 광고 제공을 위해 필요해요. 이메일 cs@watcha.co.kr

column2: Web Video Cast | Browser to TV
column13: Web Video Caster® allows you to watch on your TV videos from your favorite websites including movies, TV shows, live streams of news, sports. It also lets you cast local videos stored on your phone. Photos and audio files are also supported. Subtitles are detected on the web page, you can also use your own subtitles, or you can use the integrated search of OpenSubtitles.org. SUPPORTED STREAMING DEVICES Web Video Caster® supports the most popular streaming devices, allowing your TV to stream videos directly from the web. • Chromecast. • Roku. • DLNA receivers. • Amazon Fire TV and Fire TV Stick. • Smart TVs: LG Netcast and WebOS, Samsung, Sony, and others*. • PlayStation 4 - by using its web browser. • Most web browsers by visiting http://cast2tv.app (PS4, Smart TVs, other consoles and set top boxes). • And more. *If you experience compatibility issues, contact us and include the brand and model number. SUPPORTED MEDIA • HLS live streams in M3U8 format, where supported by your streaming device. • Movies and TV shows. • MP4 videos. • Live news and sports. • Any HTML5 videos*. • Photos. • Audio files including music. *Your streaming device must be capable of decoding the video you are playing. Web Video Cast™ does not perform any video/audio decoding or transcoding. GET STARTED Follow these simple step-by-step instructions to start streaming: 1.- Browse the web or the local file explorer to find the video, audio or photo you want to cast to your tv. 2.- If the video or audio is on a website, try to play the video inside the web page. If it is a photo, you can long press on it to cast it. 3.- Connect to your streaming device to cast the video, music, or picture. PREMIUM FEATURES** • No in-app advertising. • Bookmarks. • Home page setting. • Video history. • Queue. • Homescreen shortcut. • Most visited site. **This functionality does not apply universally to all streaming devices. LIMITATIONS & DISCLOSURES As with all apps, there are some limitations we are aware of and want you to know about up front. • We are in no way associated with any web media providers and we do not have control over the content they provide. • The app does not support tab casting, like the Chromecast extension for the PC web browser. • We cannot do anything to fix issues that arise on the server side (media content provider) such as failure to play or buffering, which is especially common during heavy load times and weekends. • Refunds are only issued within 24 hours of purchase and you must submit the order number in text, not a screenshot. PERMISSIONS • Phone state - To allow the pausing of videos on incoming phone calls. • Wi-Fi connection information - Required for streaming devices and for the browser. • Photos/Media/Files (storage in general) - Required for the download functionality. • In-app purchases - For premium version. • Wake-lock - To keep phone awake while routing videos through phone. Should only affect live streams and authenticated videos. • Accounts/Identity - Required by Google Play Services (7.5+). • Location - This is only requested on devices with Android 6+ so the user gets a chance to decide and it is only requested when the website you are browsing wants to know your location. You can always say deny it, it will not affect anything other than that website.

column9: KiKA Der Kinderkanal von ARD und ZDF
column13: The KiKA app (formerly the KiKA Player app) is the free media library from the children's channel of ARD and ZDF and offers children's series, children's films, and videos for children to stream and watch offline, as well as the TV program via live stream. ❤ FAVORITE VIDEOS Did your child miss "Schloss Einstein" or "Die Pfefferkörner"? Did you search for "Unser Sandmännchen" at night because your kids can't sleep? With the KiKA app, you can easily find many programs, children's series, and children's films from KiKA. Whether it's fairy tales and films, Fireman Sam, Löwenzahn, or the Smurfs – we have something for everyone. Check out our media library! 📺 TV PROGRAM Want to know what's on TV? The KiKA TV program is always available as a live stream. Your child can jump back two hours and watch the programs they just missed. And they can see what's airing today. ✈️ MY OFFLINE VIDEOS Are you out and about with your kids and don't have Wi-Fi or enough mobile data to watch your favorite series? Simply save videos to your offline area beforehand. This way, kids can watch our children's programs anytime, anywhere with the KiKA app – whether at home or on the go. 🙂 MY PROFILE - MY AREA Does your younger child especially like KiKANiNCHEN, Super Wings, and Shaun the Sheep, but your older sibling would rather watch the educational programs and series for older children like Checker Welt, logo!, PUR+, the WGs, or Die beste Klasse Deutschlands? Each child can create their own profile and save their favorite videos in the "I Like" section, watch videos they've started later in the "Continue Watching" section, or save them for offline use. Whether it's a heart-shaped bear, a cyclops, or a unicorn – everyone can choose their own avatar and customize the app to their own liking. 📺 STREAM VIDEOS TO YOUR TV Is your tablet or phone too small for you? Would you rather watch your favorite series or movies together as a family or with friends? With Chromecast, you can stream the videos to the big screen. The KiKA app is also available as an HbbTV offering on your smart TV. This way, you can bring children's programming directly into your living room. ℹ️ INFORMATION FOR PARENTS The family-friendly KiKA app (formerly the KiKA Player app) is protected and age-appropriate. It only displays children's films and series that are appropriate for children. Only age-appropriate videos are recommended based on the age information in the profile. In the parents' area, parents will find additional features to tailor the content even more to their children. It is possible to limit the display of videos throughout the app to films and series for preschool children. The live stream can be turned on and off. You can also set the available video time using the app's alarm clock. The public children's program remains free, non-violent, and ad-free as usual. 📌APP DETAILS AND FEATURES AT A GLANCE Simple and intuitive design Set up individual profiles Favorite videos, series, and films Continue watching videos you've started later Save videos for offline use Watch KiKA TV programs via live stream Discover new videos in the KiKA app Set age-appropriate video offerings Set app alarms to limit children's video viewing time ✉️ CONTACT US We're always happy to hear from you! KiKA strives to further develop the app at a high level of content and technology. Feedback – praise, criticism, ideas, or even reporting problems – helps us achieve this. Send us your feedback, rate our app, or send a message to kika@kika.de. ABOUT US KiKA is a joint offering of the ARD regional broadcasting corporations and ZDF. Since 1997, KiKA has been offering ad-free, targeted content for children ages three to 13. Available on demand in the KiKA app (formerly the KiKA Player app), the KiKANiNCHEN app, the KiKA Quiz app, on kika.de, and live on TV.

If your Nexus Player is not found, please restart the app. 2) Google your favorite video (e.g. on youtube) or enter the video-url directly in the browser address bar by tapping on the pen icon in the menu bar. 3) Wait some seconds until the video link (mp4, m3u8, etc.) is shown below the browser.
